kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Between Mason and Potter, one goes with Matilda and the other with Oldwall.
The artisan in Bridgegate's levy is immediately below Aldric.
Either Kingsford goes with 14 coins or someone in the River Ward goes with 14 coins (but not both).
Exactly two of Cedric, the artisan in Bridgegate, the artisan in Riverside, and the artisan with 10 coins belong to the Ironmongers' Guild.
More members of the Gate Ward are in the Ironmongers' Guild than members of the River Ward.
Exactly two of these are true: Cedric goes with Potter; Edmund goes with 10 coins; Blacksmith goes with 16 coins.
If 18 coins goes with Highrow, then Carpenter does not go with 10 coins.
Exactly one member of the River Ward goes with (Tanner or Potter).
The Mason's levy is at least 2 coins more than Rowan.
Between Beatrix and Kingsford, one goes with 10 coins and the other with 12 coins.
At most one of (the members of the Clothiers' Guild and the artisan in Bridgegate) goes with (20 coins or 18 coins).
The artisan in Kingsford's levy is lower than both Aldric and the Tanner.
Cooper goes with either Bridgegate or Oldwall.
